principles.principle: Use 3-7 targeted searches maximum rather than many broad searches - system performance degrades with higher counts
principles.evidence: Crypto strategy explicitly caps at 3-6 searches due to 'parsing limitations', NextJS uses 4-7 for 'quality control', all high-scoring outputs stayed within this range

principles.principle: Establish and follow a clear source hierarchy with official/primary sources prioritized over secondary sources
principles.evidence: All domains show higher scores when following source hierarchies: crypto (government > financial media), NextJS (official docs > source code > benchmarks), services (platform docs > analyst reports > blogs)

principles.principle: Assign explicit confidence levels (High/Medium/Low) to every claim with detailed reasoning for the confidence assessment
principles.evidence: High-scoring outputs consistently use confidence levels: crypto 8.0 score has 'confidence level (High 80%+, Medium 50-79%, Low <50%) with detailed reasoning', similar patterns across domains

principles.principle: Cross-verify numerical claims, dates, and key facts through 2+ independent sources from different source types
principles.evidence: Crypto strategy requires 'Every numerical claim must be cross-verified through 2+ different source types', high scores (7.3-8.0) show this verification, single-source claims get penalized

principles.principle: Clearly distinguish between verified facts and speculation/inferences, explicitly flagging uncertainty
principles.evidence: Highest scores show 'clearly distinguishes verified facts from projections' and 'flags uncertainty explicitly rather than fabricating details' - this appears in top examples across all domains

principles.principle: Document knowledge gaps and research limitations explicitly rather than fabricating information
principles.evidence: High-scoring outputs have comprehensive 'knowledge_gaps' sections explaining what wasn't found and why, rather than making unsupported claims

principles.principle: Only cite URLs that were actually fetched and verify claims against actual content rather than search snippets
principles.evidence: Productized services strategy explicitly requires 'Only cite URLs that you have actually fetched. Cross-check every URL reference against your tool_usage log' - violations cause accuracy penalties

principles.principle: Provide mechanistic explanations for findings - explain WHY something happened, not just what happened
principles.evidence: Crypto strategy requires 'explain the underlying mechanisms, causation, and implications' and high-scoring outputs show 'mechanistic analysis' and 'technical depth'

principles.principle: Include specific quantitative data (percentages, dollar amounts, timeframes) when available rather than vague descriptions
principles.evidence: High scores correlate with 'exact dollar amounts', 'precise dates', 'specific percentages' - vague claims consistently score lower across domains

principles.principle: Verify temporal claims against current date context and flag any anachronistic information
principles.evidence: All strategies emphasize TODAY'S DATE verification, crypto requires '2026 TEMPORAL VERIFICATION', violations mentioned in weaknesses sections

domain_specific_insights.insight: Mandatory government source priority for regulatory topics, SEC.gov and Federal Register searches required first
domain_specific_insights.not_transferable_because: Specific to financial regulatory research - other domains don't have equivalent government oversight structures

domain_specific_insights.insight: Direct source code repository examination required for implementation details, GitHub URL access mandatory
domain_specific_insights.not_transferable_because: Only applies to open-source software research - other domains may not have accessible codebases

domain_specific_insights.insight: Platform documentation and investor reports take priority over founder community discussions
domain_specific_insights.not_transferable_because: Specific to business/startup research - academic or technical domains have different authoritative source hierarchies

meta_observations: All high-performing strategies converge on limiting search quantity (3-7 max), establishing clear source hierarchies, and emphasizing intellectual honesty through explicit uncertainty quantification. The universal pattern is quality over quantity in both searches and sources, with rigorous verification being more important than comprehensive coverage.
